name: Advanced Flashcards WebAppServer
notes: 8.6.2 (build 59): Edit Decks now includes tabbed Edit Deck + Edit Cards management (search/filter/select, per-card edit/remove w/ soft-delete + restore, duplicate prompt, Deleted includes Edited history w/ clear). Added AI template bulk editor (multi-field, auto example preview, Preview All) and improved modal/mobile UI + stability fixes.
